title: Fourth Fleet (disambiguation)
content:
'''Fourth Fleet''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Fourth Fleet]]'''— a numbered [[fleet]] of the [[Galactic Republic]] that was active during the [[Clone Wars]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Fourth Fleet]]'''
*'''[[Galactic Republic Fourth Fleet]]'''
*'''[[New Republic Fourth Fleet]]'''
*'''[[Fourth Battle Group (Rebel Alliance)|Rebel Alliance Fourth Battle Fleet]]'''
